title: Office of Outreach - Museum of Technical Demonstration
body:
Designs for the opening day posters are coming along nicely. We’ll need to run the video ad edits by legal, to be sure everything looks good.

All rejected promotional materials are to be sent to Trash Handlers for recycling.

MythOS opening day is expected to be a big event and the hope is to hold annual celebrations, so these materials will be necessary for future promotions.

We hope to have updates on exhibits as improvements are completed in MythOS City Development.

- Steve!
‎
